title: Ores Recipes!
description: The Recipes needed from a long time to get ores are here!
body:
# Ore Recipes

Ore Recipes enhances the Minecraft crafting system by allowing players to craft ores from basic materials like **stone** and **gems**. With this system, players can now craft ores such as **Diamond Ore**, **Iron Ore**, and **Gold Ore** directly from **stone** and **diamonds** using **shapeless recipes** or optimized crafting systems.

## Features

- **Shapeless Ore Crafting**: Craft ores like **Diamond Ore**, **Iron Ore**, **Gold Ore**, and more, from **stone** and **gems** using flexible, shapeless recipes.
- **Expanded Recipes**: Additional recipes that allow **stone** and **gems** to be converted into various ores (e.g., **Iron Ore**, **Diamond Ore**, **Gold Ore**).
- **Balanced Resource Requirements**: Recipes are designed to ensure fair resource use and provide a balanced gameplay experience.

## Installation

1. Download the latest version from the **[Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ores-recipes/versions/)**.
2. Follow the installation instructions based on your platform.
3. Ensure you're using Minecraft **1.20.1+** for compatibility.

## Dependencies
- **Minecraft Version**: 1.20+ (For Mod And Datapack)
- **Forge/Fabric** (For Mod)
